name: Primax Electronics Ltd.
summary: Primax Electronics Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells mobile device components, computer peripherals, business equipment, and digital home products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers mobile device components, such as camera and fingerprint modules, solutions for wireless charging, ultra-thin keyboard modules, and mobile camera systems; Bluetooth communications devices, such as Bluetooth headphones, audio transmitters, hands-free car headsets, identification card headphones, image viewers, digital pens, GPS receivers, etc.; and mobile device accessories comprising charging cradles, data cables, car chargers, hands-free car accessories, etc. It also provides PC peripherals, including computer input devices, gaming peripherals, ultra-thin Bluetooth tablet keyboards, and digital writing tablets/stylus; and business equipment consisting of scanners, printers/multifunction printers, shredders, and laminators. In addition, the company offers digital home products, such as smart TV remote controls, wireless portable storage devices, and Internet music boxes; audio products; and product development services comprising usability test and industrial design. Primax Electronics Ltd. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
